title: Challat eater droid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:Challatdroid.jpg|thumb|A challat eater droid attacks Simon Greyshade.]]

'''[[Challat eater]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]]''' were small, [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]]-equipped [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droids]] modeled after the [[challat eater]]s of [[Troiken/Legends|Troiken]]. They swarmed victims and cut them repeatedly until the victims bled to death. A swarm of such droids, directed by [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Tsian]]'s remote control, attacked [[Simon Greyshade/Legends|Simon Greyshade]]. When [[Sagoro Autem]] rendered Tsian unconscious, the remote link was cut, and the droids shut down.

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 47|''Republic'' 47]]
